summary: Frontend-only testing for Alawi Cars luxury German website. All 16 critical functionalities verified successfully via Playwright on the public preview URL. Navbar, hero, language switcher (DE/EN/FR/IT) with localStorage persistence (key 'alawi.lang'), services (6 cards), gallery tabs (paint/detailing/wheels/interior) + compare slider, contact CTAs (WhatsApp/phone/email), footer, mobile menu, and anchor navigation all working as specified.

issues: react-compare-slider warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative/fixed/absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' Non-blocking but worth adding position:relative on the slider wrapper to silence the warning.

critical_code_review_comments: All href values for CTAs match spec: https://wa.me/41762944702, tel:+41762944702, mailto:info@alawicars.ch.
LanguageContext correctly persists to localStorage key 'alawi.lang' and defaults to DE on first visit.
No '15 Jahre Erfahrung' / '15 years experience' text anywhere in source or rendered DOM (verified via grep + DOM inner_text).
Translations file includes complete DE/EN/FR/IT for nav, hero, about, services (6 items), gallery (4 tabs), CTA, and footer.
Minor: react-compare-slider emits a console warning about non-static container positioning. Add position:relative on the immediate wrapper around <ReactCompareSlider/> in Gallery.jsx to remove it.

Minor: Mobile WhatsApp/phone/email contact-card buttons in ContactCTA are good, but the email button is only present in the contact card (no email button next to WhatsApp/Call CTAs); spec only required mailto on contact-email-row, which is fine.
seed_data_creation: None - static marketing site, backend not used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend fully validated end-to-end on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. All data-testids in spec exist and work: lang-DE/EN/FR/IT, mobile-lang-*, gallery-tab-paint/detailing/wheels/interior, gallery-slider-wrapper, cta-whatsapp-button, cta-call-button, contact-email-row, contact-phone-row, main-navbar, main-footer, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-nav-link-*, nav-link-*. Backend not used by frontend (verified). Only nit: silence react-compare-slider position warning by adding 'position:relative' (or className 'relative') on the wrapper that directly contains <ReactCompareSlider/>.
